nasb.text: Jacob answered his mother Rebekah, “Behold, Esau my brother is a hairy man and I am a smooth man.

esv.text: But Jacob said to Rebekah his mother, “Behold, my brother Esau is a hairy man, and I am a smooth man.

cnv.text: 雅各對他的母親利百加說：“但是哥哥以掃渾身是毛，而我卻是個皮膚光滑的人。

ccb.text: 雅各对母亲利百加说：“哥哥以扫浑身是毛，我的皮肤光滑。

csbs.text: 雅各对他母亲莉白加说：“看哪，我哥哥以扫多毛，而我皮肤光滑。
